item.title: Sensex and Nifty Rally as Telecom and Metal Sectors Lead Market Gains
item.description: Indian equity markets witnessed a robust rally on 14 May 2026, with the Sensex surging 789.74 points (1.06%) to close at 75,398.72 and the Nifty 50 advancing 277 points (1.18%) to 23,689.60. The broad-based gains were led by strong performances in the telecommunications and metal sectors, while information technology stocks lagged. Market breadth remained positive with a healthy advance-decline ratio, supported by mixed activity across large, mid and small caps amid cautious foreign institutional investor flows. Time: 40 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Surges 0.95% Led by NLC India; Broad-Based Gains Mark Market Resilience
item.description: The BSE Midcap 150 index advanced by 0.95% on 14 May 2026, emerging as the best-performing segment in the broader market. This upward momentum was driven by strong sectoral contributions and a favourable advance-decline ratio, signalling broad-based buying interest across mid-cap stocks. Time: 40 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Shows Mixed Trends with Modest Gains and Sectoral Divergence
item.description: The BSE Smallcap 250 index recorded a modest gain of 0.18% on 14 May 2026, continuing its status as the best-performing market capitalisation segment amid a mixed performance across sectors and a narrow advance-decline ratio. While select stocks delivered robust returns, the overall breadth of the small-cap universe remained subdued, reflecting cautious investor sentiment ahead of key earnings announcements. Time: 40 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Advances 1.08% Led by Adani Enterprises; Defensive Stocks Show Mixed Trends
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, recorded a solid gain of 1.08% on 14 May 2026, outperforming other market capitalisation categories. This advance was driven by strong performances from heavyweight stocks such as Adani Enterprises, which surged 8.55%, while some counters like Tube Investments lagged with a decline of 4.73%. The breadth of the large-cap index remained robust, with 75 stocks advancing against 25 decliners, reflecting a 3.0x advance-decline ratio. Time: 40 minutes ago

item.title: National Standard (India) Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: National Standard (India) Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 14 May 2026, touching a new 52-week low of Rs 1152.55 as the stock faced intense selling pressure, underperforming its sector and broader market indices despite a positive trend in the Sensex. Time: 54 minutes ago

item.title: KEI Industries Ltd Surges 5.14% to Day's High of Rs 5175 — Outperforms Sector by 2.58 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 1.06% on 14 Jun 2026, yet KEI Industries Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 5.14% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 5175. This 2.58 percentage-point outperformance over the Cables - Electricals sector's 2.6% rise signals a stock-specific momentum surge rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 55 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Aspira Pathlab & Diagnostics Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 84.22
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 84.22 on 14 May 2026, Aspira Pathlab & Diagnostics Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a 42.7% gain over the past year and outpacing the Sensex’s decline of 7.3% during the same period. This milestone reflects a strong technical momentum that has propelled the stock well above its key moving averages and technical thresholds. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Five Consecutive Losses Push National Standard (India) Ltd to a New 52-Week Low
item.description: For the fifth consecutive session, National Standard (India) Ltd has closed lower, slipping to within 2.03% of its 52-week low at Rs 1206 on 14 May 2026. This persistent decline has dragged the stock down by 12.76% over the past five days, underperforming its sector by 2.87% today alone. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Indus Finance Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 103
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Indus Finance Ltd touched a fresh 52-week high of Rs 103 on 14 May 2026, marking a remarkable rally that has seen the stock gain 157.5% over the past year against a Sensex decline of 7.29%. This milestone underscores the powerful momentum driving the micro-cap NBFC, supported by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and sustained price strength. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Rossell Techsys Ltd Surges 7.25% to Day's High of Rs 938 — Outperforms Sector by 6.47 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 1.18% on 14 Jun 2026, yet Rossell Techsys Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 7.25% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 938. This 6.47 percentage-point outperformance over its Aerospace & Defense sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Spectrum Electrical Industries Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Spectrum Electrical Industries Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 1343.3 as the stock faced significant price pressure, underperforming its sector and broader market indices despite a generally positive market environment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Ipca Laboratories Ltd Surges 5.57% to Day's High of Rs 1590 — Outperforms Sector by 3.2 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 1.18% on 14 Jun 2026, yet Ipca Laboratories Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 5.57% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 1590. This 3.2-percentage-point outperformance over the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector’s 2.37% rise highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a general market lift. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Man Infraconstruction Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 14 May 2026
item.description: Man Infraconstruction Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 14 May 2026, touching a low of Rs 118.65 as the stock faced notable price pressure. The construction sector stock underperformed sharply against the broader market, continuing a multi-day downward trend amid mixed technical signals and sectoral headwinds. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Vidhi Specialty Food Ingredients Ltd Surges 7.22% to Day's High of Rs 308 — Outperforms Sector by 4.54 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 1.18% on 14 May 2026, yet Vidhi Specialty Food Ingredients Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 7.22% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 308. This 4.54-percentage-point outperformance over its Specialty Chemicals sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Cummins India Ltd. Rallies 3.13% and Approaches 52-Week High — Momentum Builds in Diesel Engines Sector
item.description: The Sensex advanced 1.18% on 14 May 2026, yet Cummins India Ltd. outpaced the broader market with a 3.13% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 5,373. This 1.95-percentage-point outperformance over the sector's 2.44% rise signals a stock-specific strength that merits closer examination. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Magnus Steel Leads Exceptional Half-Year Returns Among Micro and Small Caps
item.description: Magnus Steel, a micro cap stock from the Other Electrical Equipment sector, has delivered an extraordinary return of 1074.55% over the past six months, vastly outperforming its peers and benchmark indices. This remarkable surge highlights the stock’s strong fundamentals, bullish technical outlook, and investor enthusiasm amid a challenging market environment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Exceptional Returns from Small and Micro Cap Stocks Outperform Benchmark in One Year
item.description: Cupid, a Small Cap stock from the FMCG sector, has delivered a staggering 605.33% return over the past year, significantly outperforming broader market indices and its sector peers. Backed by a strong fundamental profile and bullish technical indicators, this stock has emerged as a top performer in a challenging market environment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Sanofi Consumer Healthcare India Ltd Surges 8.19% to Day's High of Rs 4990 — Outperforms Sector by 6.14 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 1.05% on 14 May 2026, yet Sanofi Consumer Healthcare India Ltd outpaced the broader market with an 8.19% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 4990. This 6.14-percentage-point outperformance over the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector’s 2.36% rise signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Sterlite Technologies Ltd Hits New 52-Week High of Rs 424.25 on Back of Strong Technical Signals
item.description: From a low of Rs 66.42 to a striking Rs 424.25, Sterlite Technologies Ltd has surged over 521% in the past year, outpacing the Sensex which declined by 7.29% in the same period. This remarkable rally culminated in a fresh 52-week high on 14 May 2026, fuelled predominantly by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and sustained price momentum. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Sterlite Technologies Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 419 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Sterlite Technologies Ltd has reached a new all-time high on 14 May 2026, underscoring a remarkable journey of growth and resilience in the Telecom Equipment & Accessories sector. The stock closed at Rs. 419.00, surpassing its previous 52-week high and reflecting a strong performance trajectory over multiple time horizons. Time: 1 hour ago
